notes.planningNotes: Exceptional planning quality (90/100). All 9 phase plans exist with correct checkbox format. Parallelization strategy defined for Phase 04 with 3 work streams. Design documentation exists but spread across multiple files (consolidation recommended but not blocking).
notes.technicalNotes: LLM-patch integration is highest risk - Phase 00 (Research) validates approach before full development. Performance target: <10 minute MVP generation. Success criteria: ≥95% completion rate across all stacks.
notes.agentCoordination: Phase 04 (Development) requires 3 parallel lanes for work streams. Integration phase requires all agents coordinating. Weekly integration checks prevent late-stage surprises.
